# Partition table — dual-OTA from day on: # App slots are 3 MB each (room for LVGL + esp-adf later). Reserved slots for
# NVS encryption keys (Phase 7) and core dump (Phase 19) are laid out now so the
# flash map never has to change once devices are in the field.
# App partitions must start on a 64 KB (0x10000) boundary. The gap between
# nvs_keys and ota_0 is the alignment padding — intentional
